message:
chore: close 5 effectively-complete beads and update stale FTUI header comment

Closed ft-akx00.5.4 (PaneCapabilities fully implemented, no stubs),
ft-xbnl0.3.1 (machine-control/client-domain uses real state),
ft-akx00.5.3 (FTUI views backed by live data),
ft-xbnl0.3.2 (scrollback/FTUI surfaces read real data),
ft-akx00.6.4 was already closed by IndigoFox.

Updated ftui_stub.rs header comment to reflect that all views are
live state-backed — the old "placeholder message" language was stale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
